creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

New version for 2.17.12:

diff -r -u databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2013-05-06 23:25:10.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2013-05-10 17:21:47.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/databases/cego/Makefile 317525 2013-05-06 15:34:17Z bapt $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.17.10
+PORTVERSION=	2.17.12
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2013-05-06 23:25:10.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2013-05-10 17:21:49.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cego-2.17.10.tar.gz) = c4d054e40b52c762c43dd99d30702850939802a99293fdecf9b27b311e77e211
-SIZE (cego-2.17.10.tar.gz) = 633319
+SHA256 (cego-2.17.12.tar.gz) = a900cb61ed440476797dded050b1cb3c3ac0785017bad40516ff52db0f0f83ab
+SIZE (cego-2.17.12.tar.gz) = 634109
